title: What do you think about AI Trading Bots with Openclaw
author: Minimum-Lychee7812
selftext:
I recently saw this YouTube video of someone explaining how to setup a trading bot. In a later video, he showed the results of the 9 trades the bot took. It was mindblowing, but I always think, if it seems too good to be true, it probably is. But on the other side I think: a trading bot is always watching the market, monitoring the news, not taking positions out of emotions,… and those are the big pros of having a bot trade for you. I really want to make something like this, but what are you guys’ experience? Does it work good? What type of strategies are you giving the bot? Is it adaptive to different market? What are drawdowns like?

YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ce9lJz45bWM

comments.author: Patient-Bumblebee
comments.body: No need for a bot bro. Just spin up an agent that trades for you. Can do it on Everstrike for free. Just write a simple prompt and run it.

replies.author: HFT0DTE
replies.body: does everstirke only tard crypto bs?
